attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider focused on KOM jersey accumulation rather than stage victories. Attacks early to enter breaks positioned for intermediate and summit sprint points.
team_tactics: Minimal visible team support; operates independently in breaks. Team allows him freedom to chase minor classification rather than supporting GC or sprint objectives.
terrain_preference: Categorized climbs where KOM points are available, regardless of difficulty. Prioritizes point-scoring opportunities over terrain that suits pure stage-winning.
vulnerability: Willing to expend disproportionate energy defending minor jersey positions. Can be forced into defensive racing by rivals contesting same points, draining resources without stage reward.
key_patterns: Immediately joins breakaways when KOM jersey defense required, overriding energy conservation (2 instances)
Contests intermediate KOM sprints aggressively when defending jersey lead (2 instances)
Prioritizes category jersey tactics over stage ambitions in tactical decisions (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Successfully executing KOM jersey strategy but showing willingness to expend energy for low-value points suggests tactical focus rather than peak competitive form
